---
title: "diag_forge.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/diag_forge.py"
loc: 52
complexity: 3
logic_score: 4.60
style_score: 3.54
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.88
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating diag. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.5/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [json](file://json)
- [uuid](file://uuid)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [src.core.payload](file://src.core.payload)
- [src.cstar.core.forge](file://src.cstar.core.forge)

### Exports
- `diag`
